description: Cross-dataset validation of CPA on CREAK (entity-centric real-world claims about Wikipedia entities), using Pythia-1.4B. Tests whether probe-circuit misalignment is dataset-specific or structural.

dataset.name: CREAK
dataset.pair_construction: same-entity contrastive pairs: one true claim, one false claim per Wikipedia entity

interpretation: CREAK CPA=0.0148 is the strongest near-zero result across all experiments. A probe with 97.91% accuracy points in a direction ~98.5% orthogonal to the causal circuit direction. This confirms probe-circuit misalignment is a structural property of transformer truthfulness computation, not a model or dataset artifact.
paper_sentence: CPA~0 transfers to a second benchmark (CREAK entity-centric claims: CPA=0.0148), confirming that probe-circuit misalignment is a structural property of transformer truthfulness computation, not a model or dataset artifact.
